summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of EcoTrace. 19/21 pytest tests passed. All frontend flows verified end-to-end (auth, dashboard, calculator, achievements, logout, protected route). CRITICAL: AI insights endpoint fails because model name 'gpt-5.4' is rejected by OpenAI/litellm — 'Invalid model name passed in model=gpt-5.4'. Streaming response opens with 200 OK then aborts mid-stream, so frontend silently shows empty state with no error surfaced to user.

critical.issue: LLM call fails with `litellm.BadRequestError: OpenAIException - Invalid model name passed in model=gpt-5.4`. The model identifier 'gpt-5.4' on line 419 of /app/backend/server.py is not recognized by the upstream OpenAI provider via emergentintegrations. Stream returns 200 then dies, no text is persisted, /api/insights/latest stays null, and insight_seeker badge can never be earned. Use a known supported OpenAI model identifier (e.g. 'gpt-4o', 'gpt-5', or whichever current model the Emergent LLM gateway exposes).

ui_bugs.issue: When streaming /api/insights/generate aborts due to backend LLM error, the UI swallows the failure: streaming flag is reset but no error toast or message is displayed; the empty-state placeholder remains. User has no feedback that generation failed.

action_items: Replace model identifier 'gpt-5.4' in /app/backend/server.py line 419 with a model the Emergent LLM gateway accepts (e.g. .with_model('openai','gpt-4o') or 'gpt-5'). Verify by re-running POST /api/insights/generate as demo user.

Surface streaming errors in InsightsPanel: catch non-2xx responses and reader.cancel/abort errors and render a visible error inside [data-testid="insights-content"] or a toast so users know generation failed.
After fix, re-run /api/insights/generate then GET /api/insights/latest to confirm text is persisted and the insight_seeker achievement flips to earned.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py:419 — hardcoded model 'gpt-5.4' is the root cause of the only failing backend feature; should also be moved behind an env var (e.g. LLM_MODEL) to avoid future hard-codes.
server.py:98,100 — auth cookies use secure=False; acceptable for HTTP-only preview but should be conditional on environment for production.
server.py:511 — CORS allow_origins falls back to a hardcoded http://localhost:3000 default; current .env contains explicit origins so OK, but consider making missing CORS_ORIGINS fail fast for prod.
Dashboard.jsx renders all stat tiles only after data loads (good), but during initial load the screen is just a spinner with no skeleton — minor UX polish opportunity.
InsightsPanel streaming reader does not propagate fetch errors to UI state (see frontend bug above).

success_rate.frontend: 92% (all flows working except AI insights generation which is blocked by backend bug)

test_credentials: demo@ecotrace.app / demo1234 (seeded 21 days activities, used for most tests); admin@ecotrace.app / admin1234 (admin login verified); fresh registrations created on-the-fly with TEST_/test_ prefix emails.
seed_data_creation: Tests register transient users on-the-fly (test_<uuid>@ecotrace.test, empty_<uuid>@ecotrace.test). They are NOT cleaned up — main agent may want to add a teardown that purges users with @ecotrace.test domain. Demo user's seeded activities are untouched (delete tests use freshly-created activities only).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py is fully reusable — run: pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v. 19 tests should pass; the 2 in TestInsights (test_generate_streaming, test_latest_after_generate) will pass once the gpt-5.4 model name is fixed. Frontend works end-to-end; verified testids: stat-today/week/streak/month, trend-chart, category-breakdown-chart, recent-activities, ai-insights-panel, generate-insights-button, insights-empty-state, insights-content, category-tab-{transport,energy,food,shopping}, activity-type-car_petrol, activity-value-input, co2-preview (correctly shows 1.92 kg for 10 km petrol), log-activity-submit-button, dashboard-log-activity-button, logout-button, auth-{email,password,submit,error-message}-input/button. Demo user dashboard verified: today_kg=10.24, week_kg=49.19 (55% of global), streak=21, month_kg=168.33, 96.2 trees to offset. Demo achievements: 7/9 earned including bonus light_footprint.
rca_of_the_issue: AI Insights failure RCA — Trace: emergentintegrations LlmChat.with_model('openai','gpt-5.4') -> litellm acompletion -> OpenAI provider responds 400: 'Invalid model name passed in model=gpt-5.4'. ChatError is raised inside the async generator gen(); FastAPI StreamingResponse has already sent headers (200) so the client just sees the connection terminate with no body, no error JSON. Mitigation: change line 419 to a supported model name. Reproduction: log in as demo, POST /api/insights/generate — backend log immediately shows BadRequestError; response body is empty bytes.
